java.text.SimpleDateFormat\nimport java.util.*\n\ndata class ParsedSms(\n    val caseNumber: String?,\n    val courtName: String?,\n    val hearingTime: Long?,\n    val partyNames: String?,\n    val webUrl: String?\n)\n\nclass SmsParser {\n    // 案号: （2024）鲁1312民初1324号\n    private val caseNumberPattern = Regex(\"[（(]\\\\d{4}[）)][^\\\\s，。,\\\\.]+号\")\n    // 法院名称: 【xxx法院】\n    private val courtPattern = Regex(\"【(.+?法院[）】]?)\")\n    // 当事人: 】xxx你好 or 】xxx，你好\n    private val partyPattern = Regex(\"】(\\\\S+?)(?:你好|，你好|,你好)\")\n    // URL\n    private val urlPattern = Regex(\"https?://[^\\\\s<>\\\"]+\")\n    // 开庭时间 - 多种格式\n    private val datePatterns = listOf(\n        Regex(\"(\\\\d{4})年(\\\\d{1,2})月(\\\\d{1,2})日[\\\\s]*(\\\\d{1,2})[时点:：](\\\\d{0,2})\"),\n        Regex(\"(\\\\d{4})-(\\\\d{1,2})-(\\\\d{1,2})\\\\s+(\\\\d{1,2}):(\\\\d{2})\"),\n        Regex(\"(\\\\d{4})/(\\\\d{1,2})/(\\\\d{1,2})\\\\s+(\\\\d{1,2}):(\\\\d{2})\")\n    )\n\n    fun parse(body: String): ParsedSms {\n        val caseNumber = caseNumberPattern.find(body)?.value\n        val courtFull = courtPattern.find(body)?.groupValues?.getOrNull(1)\n        val courtName = courtFull?.let { simplifyCourtName(it) }\n        val partyNames = partyPattern.find(body)?.groupValues?.getOrNull(1)\n        val webUrl = urlPattern.find(body)?.value\n        val hearingTime = parseHearingTime(body)\n\n        return ParsedSms(\n            caseNumber = caseNumber,\n            courtName = courtName,\n            hearingTime = hearingTime,\n            partyNames = partyNames,\n            webUrl = webUrl\n        )\n    }\n\n    private fun simplifyCourtName(name: String): String {\n        // 去掉省市前缀，保留区+法院\n        // \"临沂市河东区人民法院\" -> \"河东区法院\"\n        val cleaned = name.replace(\"】\", \"\").replace(\"【\", \"\")\n        val match = Regex(\"(\\\\S+?[区县市旗])人民法院\").find(cleaned)\n        if (match != null) {\n            val district = match.groupValues[1]\n            // 取最后一个行政区划\n            val parts = Regex(\"[省市州盟]\").split(district)\n            return \"${parts.last()}法院\"\n        }\n        return cleaned.replace(\"人民\", \"\")\n    }\n\n    private fun parseHearingTime(text: String): Long? {\n        for (pattern in datePatterns) {\n            val match = pattern.find(text) ?: continue\n            try {\n                val year = match.groupValues[1].toInt()\n                val month = match.groupValues[2].toInt()\n                val day = match.groupValues[3].toInt()\n                val hour = match.groupValues[4].toInt()\n                val minute = match.groupValues.getOrNull(5)?.takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }?.toInt() ?: 0\n                val cal = Calendar.getInstance().apply {\n                    set(year, month - 1, day, hour, minute, 0)\n                    set(Calendar.MILLISECOND, 0)\n                }\n                return cal.timeInMillis\n            } catch (_: Exception) { continue }\n        }\n        return null\n    }\n}\nKOTLIN_EOF"

val partyNames: String?,\n    val webUrl: String?\n\\)\n\nclass SmsParser {\n    // 案号: （2024）鲁1312民初1324号\n    private val caseNumberPattern = Regex\\(\"[（\\(]\\\\\\\\d{4}[）\\)][^\\\\\\\\s，。,\\\\\\\\.]+号\"\\)\n    // 法院名称: 【xxx法院】\n    private val courtPattern = Regex\\(\"【\\(.+?法院[）】]?\\)\"\\)\n    // 当事人: 】xxx你好 or 】xxx，你好\n    private val partyPattern = Regex\\(\"】\\(\\\\\\\\S+?\\)\\(?:你好|，你好|,你好\\)\"\\)\n    // URL\n    private val urlPattern = Regex\\(\"https?://[^\\\\\\\\s<>\\\\\"]+\"\\)\n    // 开庭时间 - 多种格式\n    private val datePatterns = listOf\\(\n        Regex\\(\"\\(\\\\\\\\d{4}\\)年\\(\\\\\\\\d{1,2}\\)月\\(\\\\\\\\d{1,2}\\)日[\\\\\\\\s]*\\(\\\\\\\\d{1,2}\\)[时点:：]\\(\\\\\\\\d{0,2}\\)\"\\),\n        Regex\\(\"\\(\\\\\\\\d{4}\\)-\\(\\\\\\\\d{1,2}\\)-\\(\\\\\\\\d{1,2}\\)\\\\\\\\s+\\(\\\\\\\\d{1,2}\\):\\(\\\\\\\\d{2}\\)\"\\),\n        Regex\\(\"\\(\\\\\\\\d{4}\\)/\\(\\\\\\\\d{1,2}\\)/\\(\\\\\\\\d{1,2}\\)\\\\\\\\s+\\(\\\\\\\\d{1,2}\\):\\(\\\\\\\\d{2}\\)\"\\)\n    \\)\n\n    fun parse\\(body: String\\): ParsedSms {\n        val caseNumber = caseNumberPattern.find\\(body\\)?.value\n        val courtFull = courtPattern.find\\(body\\)?.groupValues?.getOrNull\\(1\\)\n        val courtName = courtFull?.let { simplifyCourtName\\(it\\) }\n        val partyNames = partyPattern.find\\(body\\)?.groupValues?.getOrNull\\(1\\)\n        val webUrl = urlPattern.find\\(body\\)?.value\n        val hearingTime = parseHearingTime\\(body\\)\n\n        return ParsedSms\\(\n            caseNumber = caseNumber,\n            courtName = courtName,\n            hearingTime = hearingTime,\n            partyNames = partyNames,\n            webUrl = webUrl\n        \\)\n    }\n\n    private fun simplifyCourtName\\(name: String\\): String {\n        // 去掉省市前缀，保留区+法院\n        // \"临沂市河东区人民法院\" -> \"河东区法院\"\n        val cleaned = name.replace\\(\"】\", \"\"\\).replace\\(\"【\", \"\"\\)\n        val match = Regex\\(\"\\(\\\\\\\\S+?[区县市旗]\\)人民法院\"\\).find\\(cleaned\\)\n        if \\(match != null\\) {\n            val district = match.groupValues[1]\n            // 取最后一个行政区划\n            val parts = Regex\\(\"[省市州盟]\"\\).split\\(district\\)\n            return \"${parts.last\\(\\)}法院\"\n        }\n        return cleaned.replace\\(\"人民\", \"\"\\)\n    }\n\n    private fun parseHearingTime\\(text: String\\): Long? {\n        for \\(pattern in datePatterns\\) {\n            val match = pattern.find\\(text\\) ?: continue\n            try {\n                val year = match.groupValues[1].toInt\\(\\)\n                val month = match.groupValues[2].toInt\\(\\)\n                val }?.toInt\\(\\) ?: 0\n                val cal = Calendar.getInstance\\(\\).apply {\n                    set\\(year, month - 1, day, hour, minute, 0\\)\n                    set\\(Calendar.MILLISECOND, 0\\)\n                }\n                return cal.timeInMillis\n            } catch \\(_: Exception\\) { continue }\n        }\n        return null\n    }\n}\nKOTLIN_EOF)"]

        "ruleContent": "\"C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Desktop\\CourtAssistant\\app\\src\\main\\java\\com\\court\\assistant\\calendar\\CalendarSync.kt\" << 'KOTLIN_EOF'\npackage com.court.assistant.calendar\n\nimport android.content.ContentUris\nimport android.content.ContentValues\nimport android.content.Context\nimport android.provider.CalendarContract\nimport java.util.*\n\nclass CalendarSync(private val context: Context) {\n\n    fun syncHearing(\n        caseNumber: String,\n        courtName: String?,\n        hearingTime: Long,\n        partyNames: String?,\n        description: String? = null\n    ): Long? {\n        // 去重：检查是否已存在\n        if (eventExists(caseNumber, hearingTime)) return null\n\n        val calendarId = getOrCreateCalendarId() ?: return null\n        val title = buildString {\n            append(\"开庭 \")\n            if (courtName != null) append(\"$courtName \")\n            append(caseNumber)\n        }\n        val desc = buildString {\n            if (partyNames != null) append(\"当事人: $partyNames\\n\")\n            append(\"案号: $caseNumber\")\n            if (description != null) append(\"\\n$description\")\n        }\n\n        val values = ContentValues().apply {\n            put(CalendarContract.Events.CALENDAR_ID, calendarId)\n            put(CalendarContract.Events.TITLE, title)\n            put(CalendarContract.Events.DESCRIPTION, desc)\n            put(CalendarContract.Events.DTSTART, hearingTime)\n            put(CalendarContract.Events.DTEND, hearingTime + 2 * 3600 * 1000) // 2小时\n            put(CalendarContract.Events.EVENT_TIMEZONE, TimeZone.getDefault().id)\n            put(CalendarContract.Events.HAS_ALARM, 1)\n        }\n\n        val uri = context.contentResolver.insert(CalendarContract.Events.CONTENT_URI, values)\n        val eventId = uri?.let { ContentUris.parseId(it) }\n\n        // 添加提醒：提前1天和1小时\n        if (eventId != null) {\n            addReminder(eventId, 24 * 60) // 1天\n            addReminder(eventId, 60)       // 1小时\n        }\n        return eventId\n    }\n\n    private fun eventExists(caseNumber: String, hearingTime: Long): Boolean {\n        val projection = arrayOf(CalendarContract.Events._ID)\n        val selection = \"${CalendarContract.Events.TITLE} LIKE ? AND ${CalendarContract.Events.DTSTART} = ?\"\n        val args = arrayOf(\"%$caseNumber%\", hearingTime.toString())\n        val cursor = context.contentResolver.query(\n            CalendarContract.Events.CONTENT_URI, projection, selection, args, null\n        )\n        val exists = cursor?.use { it.count > 0 } ?: false\n        return exists\n    }\n\n    private fun getOrCreateCalendarId(): Long? {\n        // 先查找已有日历\n        val projection = arrayOf(CalendarContract.Calendars._ID)\n        val cursor = context.contentResolver.query(\n            CalendarContract.Calendars.CONTENT_URI, projection, null, null, null\n        )\n        cursor?.use {\n            if (it.moveToFirst()) return it.getLong(0)\n        }\n        return null // 使用系统默认日历\n    }\n\n    private fun addReminder(eventId: Long, minutes: Int) {\n        val values = ContentValues().apply {\n            put(CalendarContract.Reminders.EVENT_ID, eventId)\n            put(CalendarContract.Reminders.MINUTES, minutes)\n            put(CalendarContract.Reminders.METHOD, CalendarContract.Reminders.METHOD_ALERT)\n        }\n        context.contentResolver.insert(CalendarContract.Reminders.CONTENT_URI, values)\n    }\n}\nKOTLIN_EOF"

= null\n    \\): Long? {\n        // 去重：检查是否已存在\n        if \\(eventExists\\(caseNumber, hearingTime\\)\\) return null\n\n        val calendarId = getOrCreateCalendarId\\(\\) ?: return null\n        val title = buildString {\n            append\\(\"开庭 \"\\)\n            if \\(courtName != null\\) append\\(\"$courtName \"\\)\n            append\\(caseNumber\\)\n        }\n        val desc = buildString {\n            if \\(partyNames != null\\) append\\(\"当事人: $partyNames\\\\n\"\\)\n            append\\(\"案号: $caseNumber\"\\)\n            if \\(description != null\\) append\\(\"\\\\n$description\"\\)\n        }\n\n        val values = ContentValues\\(\\).apply {\n            put\\(CalendarContract.Events.CALENDAR_ID, calendarId\\)\n            put\\(CalendarContract.Events.TITLE, title\\)\n            put\\(CalendarContract.Events.DESCRIPTION, desc\\)\n            put\\(CalendarContract.Events.DTSTART, hearingTime\\)\n            put\\(CalendarContract.Events.DTEND, hearingTime + 2 * 3600 * 1000\\) // 2小时\n            put\\(CalendarContract.Events.EVENT_TIMEZONE, TimeZone.getDefault\\(\\).id\\)\n            put\\(CalendarContract.Events.HAS_ALARM, 1\\)\n        }\n\n        val uri = context.contentResolver.insert\\(CalendarContract.Events.CONTENT_URI, values\\)\n        val eventId = uri?.let { ContentUris.parseId\\(it\\) }\n\n        // 添加提醒：提前1天和1小时\n        if \\(eventId != null\\) {\n            addReminder\\(eventId, 24 * 60\\) // 1天\n            addReminder\\(eventId, 60\\)       // 1小时\n        }\n        return eventId\n    }\n\n    private fun eventExists\\(caseNumber: String, hearingTime: Long\\): Boolean {\n        val projection = arrayOf\\(CalendarContract.Events._ID\\)\n        val selection = \"${CalendarContract.Events.TITLE} LIKE ? AND ${CalendarContract.Events.DTSTART} = ?\"\n        val args = arrayOf\\(\"%$caseNumber%\", hearingTime.toString\\(\\)\\)\n        val cursor = context.contentResolver.query\\(\n            CalendarContract.Events.CONTENT_URI, projection, selection, args, null\n        \\)\n        val exists = cursor?.use { it.count > 0 } ?: false\n        return exists\n    }\n\n    private fun getOrCreateCalendarId\\(\\): Long? {\n        // 先查找已有日历\n        val projection = arrayOf\\(CalendarContract.Calendars._ID\\)\n        val cursor = context.contentResolver.query\\(\n            CalendarContract.Calendars.CONTENT_URI, projection, null, null, null\n        \\)\n        cursor?.use {\n            if \\(it.moveToFirst\\(\\)\\) return it.getLong\\(0\\)\n        }\n        return null // 使用系统默认日历\n    }\n\n    private fun addReminder\\(eventId: Long, minutes: Int\\) {\n        val values = ContentValues\\(\\).apply {\n            put\\(CalendarContract.Reminders.EVENT_ID, eventId\\)\n            put\\(CalendarContract.Reminders.MINUTES, minutes\\)\n            put\\(CalendarContract.Reminders.METHOD, CalendarContract.Reminders.METHOD_ALERT\\)\n        }\n        context.contentResolver.insert\\(CalendarContract.Reminders.CONTENT_URI, values\\)\n    }\n}\nKOTLIN_EOF)"]

= null, cookies: String? = null): DownloadResult = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {\n        try {\n            val requestBuilder = Request.Builder().url(url)\n            val cookie = cookies ?: CookieManager.getInstance()?.getCookie(url)\n            if (cookie != null) {\n                requestBuilder.addHeader(\"Cookie\", cookie)\n            }\n            val response = client.newCall(requestBuilder.build()).execute()\n            if (!response.isSuccessful) return@withContext DownloadResult.Error(\"HTTP ${response.code}\")\n\n            val contentDisposition = response.header(\"Content-Disposition\")\n            val resolvedName = fileName\n                ?: parseFileNameFromDisposition(contentDisposition)\n                ?: \"document_${System.currentTimeMillis()}.pdf\"\n\n            val safeName = resolvedName.replace(Regex(\"[\\\\\\\\/:*?\\\"<>|]\"), \"_\")\n            val file = File(getStorageDir(), safeName)\n            response.body?.byteStream()?.use { input ->\n                file.outputStream().use { output -> input.copyTo(output) }\n            }\n            DownloadResult.Success(file.absolutePath, safeName, file.length())\n        } catch (e: Exception) {\n            DownloadResult.Error(e.message ?: \"Download failed\")\n        }\n    }\n\n    private fun parseFileNameFromDisposition(header: String?): String? {\n        if (header == null) return null\n        // filename*=UTF-8''xxx.pdf\n        Regex(\"filename\\\\*=(?:UTF-8''|utf-8'')(.+)\").find(header)?.let {\n            return java.net.URLDecoder.decode(it.groupValues[1], \"UTF-8\")\n        }\n        // filename=\"xxx.pdf\"\n        Regex(\"filename=\\\"?([^\\\"]+)\\\"?\").find(header)?.let {\n            return it.groupValues[1].trim()\n        }\n        return null\n    }\n}\n\nsealed class DownloadResult {\n    data class Success(val filePath: String, val fileName: String, val fileSize: Long) : DownloadResult()\n    data class Error(val message: String) : DownloadResult()\n}\nENDOFFILE"

= null, cookies: String? = null): DownloadResult = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {\n        try {\n            val requestBuilder = Request.Builder().url(url)\n            val cookie = cookies ?: CookieManager.getInstance()?.getCookie(url)\n            if (cookie != null) {\n                requestBuilder.addHeader(\"Cookie\", cookie)\n            }\n            val response = client.newCall(requestBuilder.build()).execute()\n            if (!response.isSuccessful) return@withContext DownloadResult.Error(\"HTTP ${response.code}\")\n\n            val contentDisposition = response.header(\"Content-Disposition\")\n            val resolvedName = fileName\n                ?: parseFileNameFromDisposition(contentDisposition)\n                ?: \"document_${System.currentTimeMillis()}.pdf\"\n\n            val safeName = resolvedName.replace(Regex(\"[\\\\\\\\/:*?\\\"<>|]\"), \"_\")\n            val file = File(getStorageDir(), safeName)\n            response.body?.byteStream()?.use { input ->\n                file.outputStream().use { output -> input.copyTo(output) }\n            }\n            DownloadResult.Success(file.absolutePath, safeName, file.length())\n        } catch (e: Exception) {\n            DownloadResult.Error(e.message ?: \"Download failed\")\n        }\n    }\n\n    private fun parseFileNameFromDisposition(header: String?): String? {\n        if (header == null) return null\n        // filename*=UTF-8''xxx.pdf\n        Regex(\"filename\\\\*=(?:UTF-8''|utf-8'')(.+)\").find(header)?.let {\n            return java.net.URLDecoder.decode(it.groupValues[1], \"UTF-8\")\n        }\n        // filename=\"xxx.pdf\"\n        Regex(\"filename=\\\"?([^\\\"]+)\\\"?\").find(header)?.let {\n            return it.groupValues[1].trim()\n        }\n        return null\n    }\n}\n\nsealed class DownloadResult {\n    data class Success(val filePath: String, val fileName: String, val fileSize: Long) : DownloadResult()\n    data class Error(val message: String) : DownloadResult()\n}\nENDOFFILE"

= withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {\n        val text = extractText(filePath)\n        if (text.isNullOrBlank()) return@withContext null\n        parseSubpoenaText(text)\n    }\n\n    private suspend fun extractText(filePath: String): String? {\n        // 先尝试 iText 提取\n        val iTextResult = extractWithIText(filePath)\n        if (!iTextResult.isNullOrBlank() && iTextResult.any { it.code > 0x4E00 }) {\n            return iTextResult\n        }\n        // 回退到 OCR\n        return extractWithOcr(filePath)\n    }\n\n    private fun extractWithIText(filePath: String): String? {\n        return try {\n            val reader = com.itextpdf.kernel.pdf.PdfReader(filePath)\n            val doc = com.itextpdf.kernel.pdf.PdfDocument(reader)\n            val sb = StringBuilder()\n            for (i in 1..doc.numberOfPages) {\n                val text = com.itextpdf.kernel.pdf.canvas.parser.PdfTextExtractor.getTextFromPage(doc.getPage(i))\n                sb.appendLine(text)\n            }\n            doc.close()\n            sb.toString()\n        } catch (_: Exception) { null }\n    }\n\n    private suspend fun extractWithOcr(filePath: String): String? {\n        val file = File(filePath)\n        if (!file.exists()) return null\n        val fd = ParcelFileDescriptor.open(file, ParcelFileDescriptor.MODE_READ_ONLY)\n        val renderer = PdfRenderer(fd)\n        val sb = StringBuilder()\n        val recognizer = TextRecognition.getClient(ChineseTextRecognizerOptions.Builder().build())\n\n        for (i in 0 until renderer.pageCount) {\n            val page = renderer.openPage(i)\n            val bitmap = Bitmap.createBitmap(page.width * 2, page.height * 2, Bitmap.Config.ARGB_8888)\n            page.render(bitmap, null, null, PdfRenderer.Page.RENDER_MODE_FOR_DISPLAY)\n            page.close()\n\n            val text = suspendCancellableCoroutine<String?> { cont ->\n                val image = InputImage.fromBitmap(bitmap, 0)\n                recognizer.process(image)\n                    .addOnSuccessListener { result -> cont.resume(result.text) }\n                    .addOnFailureListener { cont.resume(null) }\n            }\n            if (text != null) sb.appendLine(text)\n            bitmap.recycle()\n        }\n        renderer.close()\n        fd.close()\n        return sb.toString().takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }\n    }\n\n    private fun parseSubpoenaText(text: String): SubpoenaInfo {\n        val caseNumber = Regex(\"[（(]\\\\d{4}[）)][^\\\\s，。]+号\").find(text)?.value\n        val courtName = Regex(\"(.+?法院)\").find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)\n        val partyNames = Regex(\"(?:被告|原告|当事人)[：:]?\\\\s*(\\\\S+)\").find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)\n        val location = Regex(\"(?:应到地点|地[点址])[：:]?\\\\s*(\\\\S+)\").find(text)?.groupValues?.get(1)\n\n        var hearingTime: Long? = null\n        val timeMatch = Regex(\"(?:应到时间|开庭时间|定于)[：:]?\\\\s*(\\\\d{4})[年-](\\\\d{1,2})[月-](\\\\d{1,2})[日]?\\\\s*(\\\\d{1,2})[时点:：](\\\\d{0,2})\").find(text)\n        if (timeMatch != null) {\n            val cal = Calendar.getInstance().apply {\n                set(timeMatch.groupValues[1].toInt(),\n                    timeMatch.groupValues[2].toInt() - 1,\n                    timeMatch.groupValues[3].toInt(),\n                    timeMatch.groupValues[4].toInt(),\n                    timeMatch.groupValues[5].takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }?.toInt() ?: 0, 0)\n                set(Calendar.MILLISECOND, 0)\n            }\n            hearingTime = cal.timeInMillis\n        }\n\n        return SubpoenaInfo(caseNumber, courtName, hearingTime, partyNames, location)\n    }\n}\nENDOFFILE"

com.court.assistant.viewmodel\n\nimport android.app.Application\nimport androidx.lifecycle.AndroidViewModel\nimport androidx.lifecycle.viewModelScope\nimport com.court.assistant.CourtApp\nimport com.court.assistant.calendar.CalendarSync\nimport com.court.assistant.data.db.CourtSmsEntity\nimport com.court.assistant.data.db.PdfDocumentEntity\nimport com.court.assistant.pdf.PdfDownloadManager\nimport com.court.assistant.pdf.PdfParser\nimport com.court.assistant.pdf.DownloadResult\nimport com.court.assistant.sms.SmsParser\nimport com.court.assistant.sms.SmsReader\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.flow.*\nimport kotlinx.coroutines.launch\n\ndata class SmsWithPdfs(\n    val sms: CourtSmsEntity,\n    val pdfs: List<PdfDocumentEntity>\n)\n\ndata class UiState(\n    val smsWithPdfs: List<SmsWithPdfs> = emptyList(),\n    val loading: Boolean = false,\n    val message: String? = null,\n    val downloadCount: Int = 0\n)\n\nclass MainViewModel(application: Application) : AndroidViewModel(application) {\n    private val app = application as CourtApp\n    private val repo = app.repository\n    private val smsReader = SmsReader(application)\n    private val smsParser = SmsParser()\n    private val calendarSync = CalendarSync(application)\n    val pdfDownloader = PdfDownloadManager(application)\n    private val pdfParser = PdfParser(application)\n\n    private val _uiState = MutableStateFlow(UiState())\n    val uiState: StateFlow<UiState> = _uiState.asStateFlow()\n\n    private val _downloadEvent = MutableSharedFlow<String>()\n    val downloadEvent: SharedFlow<String> = _downloadEvent.asSharedFlow()\n\n    init {\n        viewModelScope.launch {\n            repo.getAllSms().collect { smsList ->\n                val withPdfs = smsList.map { sms ->\n                    val pdfs = repo.getPdfsBySmsId(sms.id).first()\n                    SmsWithPdfs(sms, pdfs)\n                }\n                _uiState.update { it.copy(smsWithPdfs = withPdfs, loading = false) }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    fun loadSms() {\n        viewModelScope.launch {\n            _uiState.update { it.copy(loading = true) }\n            val rawList = smsReader.readCourtSms()\n            for (raw in rawList) {\n                val hash = raw.body.hashCode()\n                if (repo.smsExists(hash)) continue\n                val parsed = smsParser.parse(raw.body)\n                val entity = CourtSmsEntity(\n                    sender = raw.sender,\n                    body = raw.body,\n                    bodyHash = hash,\n                    receivedAt = raw.date,\n                    caseNumber = parsed.caseNumber,\n                    courtName = parsed.courtName,\n                    hearingTime = parsed.hearingTime,\n                    partyNames = parsed.partyNames,\n                    webUrl = parsed.webUrl\n                )\n                val id = repo.insertSms(entity)\n                if (id > 0 && parsed.hearingTime != null && parsed.caseNumber != null) {\n                    val eventId = calendarSync.syncHearing(\n                        caseNumber = parsed.caseNumber,\n                        courtName = parsed.courtName,\n                        hearingTime = parsed.hearingTime,\n                        partyNames = parsed.partyNames\n                    )\n                    if (eventId != null) {\n                        repo.updateSms(entity.copy(id = id, calendarEventId = eventId))\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            _uiState.update { it.copy(loading = false, message = \"已读取 ${rawList.size} 条法院短信\") }\n        }\n    }\n\n    fun downloadPdf(url: String, smsId: Long, fileName: String? = null, cookies: String? = null) {\n        viewModelScope.launch {\n            val result = pdfDownloader.download(url, fileName, cookies)\n            when (result) {\n                is DownloadResult.Success -> {\n                    val isSubpoena = result.fileName.contains(\"传票\")\n                    val pdf = PdfDocumentEntity(\n                        smsId = smsId,\n                        fileName = result.fileName,\n                        filePath = result.filePath,\n                        fileSize = result.fileSize,\n                        downloadedAt = System.currentTimeMillis(),\n                        isSubpoena = isSubpoena\n                    )\n                    val pdfId = repo.insertPdf(pdf)\n                    if (pdfId > 0) {\n                        _uiState.update { it.copy(downloadCount = it.downloadCount + 1) }\n                        _downloadEvent.emit(\"已保存: ${result.fileName}\")\n                        if (isSubpoena) {\n                            parseAndSyncSubpoena(pdfId, result.filePath, smsId)\n                        }\n                    } else {\n                        _downloadEvent.emit(\"文件已存在: ${result.fileName}\")\n                    }\n                }\n                is DownloadResult.Error -> {\n                    _downloadEvent.emit(\"下载失败: ${result.message}\")\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private suspend fun parseAndSyncSubpoena(pdfId: Long, filePath: String, smsId: Long) {\n        val info = pdfParser.parseSubpoena(filePath) ?: return\n        val pdf = repo.getPdfById(pdfId) ?: return\n        val hearingDesc = buildString {\n            if (info.courtName != null) append(\"法院: ${info.courtName}\\n\")\n            if (info.partyNames != null) append(\"当事人: ${info.partyNames}\\n\")\n            if (info.location != null) append(\"地点: ${info.location}\")\n        }\n        repo.updatePdf(pdf.copy(hearingInfo = hearingDesc))\n\n        if (info.hearingTime != null && info.caseNumber != null) {\n            val eventId = calendarSync.syncHearing(\n                caseNumber = info.caseNumber,\n                courtName = info.courtName,\n                hearingTime = info.hearingTime,\n                partyNames = info.partyNames,\n                description = \"地点: ${info.location ?: \"见传票\"}\"\n            )\n            if (eventId != null) {\n                repo.updatePdf(pdf.copy(hearingInfo = hearingDesc, calendarEventId = eventId))\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    fun resetDownloadCount() {\n        _uiState.update { it.copy(downloadCount = 0) }\n    }\n\n    fun clearMessage() {\n        _uiState.update { it.copy(message = null) }\n    }\n}\nKOTLIN_EOF"

smsReader.readCourtSms\\(\\)\n            for \\(raw in rawList\\) {\n                val hash = raw.body.hashCode\\(\\)\n                if \\(repo.smsExists\\(hash\\)\\) continue\n                val parsed = smsParser.parse\\(raw.body\\)\n                val entity = CourtSmsEntity\\(\n                    sender = raw.sender,\n                    body = raw.body,\n                    bodyHash = hash,\n                    receivedAt = raw.date,\n                    caseNumber = parsed.caseNumber,\n                    courtName = parsed.courtName,\n                    hearingTime = parsed.hearingTime,\n                    partyNames = parsed.partyNames,\n                    webUrl = parsed.webUrl\n                \\)\n                val id = repo.insertSms\\(entity\\)\n                if \\(id > 0 && parsed.hearingTime != null && parsed.caseNumber != null\\) {\n                    val eventId = calendarSync.syncHearing\\(\n                        caseNumber = parsed.caseNumber,\n                        courtName = parsed.courtName,\n                        hearingTime = parsed.hearingTime,\n                        partyNames = parsed.partyNames\n                    \\)\n                    if \\(eventId != null\\) {\n                        repo.updateSms\\(entity.copy\\(id = id, calendarEventId = eventId\\)\\)\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            _uiState.update { it.copy\\(loading = false, message = \"已读取 ${rawList.size} 条法院短信\"\\) }\n        }\n    }\n\n    fun downloadPdf\\(url: String, smsId: Long, fileName: String? = null, cookies: String? = null\\) {\n        viewModelScope.launch {\n            val result = pdfDownloader.download\\(url, fileName, cookies\\)\n            when \\(result\\) {\n                is DownloadResult.Success -> {\n                    val isSubpoena = result.fileName.contains\\(\"传票\"\\)\n                    val pdf = PdfDocumentEntity\\(\n                        smsId = smsId,\n                        fileName = result.fileName,\n                        filePath = result.filePath,\n                        fileSize = result.fileSize,\n                        downloadedAt = System.currentTimeMillis\\(\\),\n                        isSubpoena = isSubpoena\n                    \\)\n                    val pdfId = repo.insertPdf\\(pdf\\)\n                    if \\(pdfId > 0\\) {\n                        _uiState.update { it.copy\\(downloadCount = it.downloadCount + 1\\) }\n                        _downloadEvent.emit\\(\"已保存: ${result.fileName}\"\\)\n                        if \\(isSubpoena\\) {\n                            parseAndSyncSubpoena\\(pdfId, result.filePath, smsId\\)\n                        }\n                    } else {\n                        _downloadEvent.emit\\(\"文件已存在: ${result.fileName}\"\\)\n                    }\n                }\n                is DownloadResult.Error -> {\n                    _downloadEvent.emit\\(\"下载失败: ${result.message}\"\\)\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private suspend fun parseAndSyncSubpoena\\(pdfId: Long, filePath: String, smsId: Long\\) {\n        val info = pdfParser.parseSubpoena\\(filePath\\) ?: return\n        val pdf = repo.getPdfById\\(pdfId\\) ?: return\n        val hearingDesc = buildString {\n            if \\(info.courtName != null\\) append\\(\"法院: ${info.courtName}\\\\n\"\\)\n            if \\(info.partyNames != null\\) append\\(\"当事人: ${info.partyNames}\\\\n\"\\)\n            if \\(info.location != null\\) append\\(\"地点: ${info.location}\"\\)\n        }\n        repo.updatePdf\\(pdf.copy\\(hearingInfo = hearingDesc\\)\\)\n\n        if \\(info.hearingTime != null && info.caseNumber != null\\) {\n            val eventId = calendarSync.syncHearing\\(\n                caseNumber = info.caseNumber,\n                courtName = info.courtName,\n                hearingTime = info.hearingTime,\n                partyNames = info.partyNames,\n                description = \"地点: ${info.location ?: \"见传票\"}\"\n            \\)\n            if \\(eventId != null\\) {\n                repo.updatePdf\\(pdf.copy\\(hearingInfo = hearingDesc, calendarEventId = eventId\\)\\)\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    fun resetDownloadCount\\(\\) {\n        _uiState.update { it.copy\\(downloadCount = 0\\) }\n    }\n\n    fun clearMessage\\(\\) {\n        _uiState.update { it.copy\\(message = null\\) }\n    }\n}\nKOTLIN_EOF)"]
